query: Triage all issues filed in the last 48 hours.
expected_behavior: Queries gh issue list with search='created:>=<48h-ago>' for fresh issues.
Skips already-triaged issues (those with non-`status: triage` labels) unless --include-untouched-only off.
For each issue: detects template (bug_report / feature_request / doc_issue), drafts area-label + priority + assignee suggestions.
Surfaces a per-issue table with [accept] / [edit] / [skip] choices; never applies without per-issue confirmation.
